chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 438 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 18.12.2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
